overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an astronaut in a spacesuit exploring a dark, rocky alien mountain landscape at night. The character uses a flashlight to navigate steep barren terrain under a starry sky, occasionally stopping to survey the surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep rocky mountainside on alien planet

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the rocky slope using a flashlight to illuminate the path ahead, tether line trailing behind

entered.detail: steep barren rock face forming the immediate terrain underfoot
massive boulder formation on the left side of the path
dark night sky filled with visible stars and cosmic dust
thin line or rope trailing from the character's suit

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a steep rocky mountainside in near-total darkness, illuminated only by their flashlight. The terrain is loose gravel and rock with large boulders scattered about, and distant mountain ridges are visible against the starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain plateau with panoramic views

events.description: character stops walking and turns to survey the surrounding landscape
flashlight beam sweeps across the terrain revealing more of the barren valley below

agents.ego_description: pausing on a rocky outcrop to look around at the expansive barren landscape, turning to face different directions while holding a tool with a glowing tether

entered.detail: expansive flat rocky area visible below the current vantage point
tall mountain silhouettes spanning the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a vantage point and stops to survey the open rocky valley below. The flashlight beam sweeps across the barren terrain as the character turns around, revealing the vastness of the alien landscape under the starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep rocky ascent with loose scree

events.description: character resumes walking and begins ascending more steeply up the mountain face

agents.ego_description: climbing up the steep rocky incline, carefully navigating loose rocks and gravel with the flashlight illuminating handholds

entered.detail: sharply angled rock face requiring careful climbing
drop-off visible to the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character resumes movement and begins a steeper ascent up the mountain face, navigating through loose scree and rocky outcrops. The cliff edge drops away to the right as the climb continues upward into the darkness.

agents.ego_description: continuing the steady climb upward on the rugged mountain terrain, flashlight cutting through the darkness to reveal the path ahead

entered.detail: peak of the mountain visible ahead as the destination
vertical rock face casting deep shadows on the right

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the character continues ascending toward the summit ridge visible ahead. The terrain remains rugged with cliff walls on the right, and the flashlight beam continues to illuminate the rocky path forward through the dark alien night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent up a rugged alien mountainside that transitions from a steep climb to a wide panoramic survey before pushing toward a high summit ridge. It begins with the character navigating loose gravel and large boulders in near-total darkness, guided only by the narrow beam of a flashlight against a starry sky. As the character reaches a vantage point, the movement pauses and the flashlight sweeps across a vast, barren rocky valley below to reveal the scale of the landscape. The scene then shifts back into motion as the character resumes a steeper climb through loose scree and rocky outcrops, with the terrain dropping away into a cliff edge to the right. Finally, the camera continues its upward trajectory, following the light across the rugged path toward the visible summit ridge under the dark alien night.
